headline: Carrier to Present at the Wells Fargo 16th Annual Global Industrials & Materials Conference
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) Chairman & CEO David Gitlin will speak at the Wells Fargo 16th Annual Industrials & Materials Conference on Tuesday, June 9, 2026, at 10:15 a.m. CT (11:15 a.m. ET).

headline: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) is Positioned for Market Share Gain Over Time
